name: spec_writing_reference
title: SPEC.md Writing Reference & Patterns
summary: Curated reference material for writing industry-grade technical specifications (SPEC.md) using RFC 2119 normative language. Contains structural patterns extracted from OpenAI Symphony's SPEC.md, the AROS Cloud Federation SPEC as a worked example, anti-patterns to avoid, and a quality checklist. Essential context for any agent tasked with creating or reviewing system specifications.

references.label: RFC 2119: Key words for use in RFCs
